task_completion.description: Verify that the five required primitive objects (UV Sphere, Cube, Cylinder, Cone, Torus) have been added to the scene.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 3D viewport to see the five distinct shapes, or check the Outliner panel (top right) for the names 'Sphere', 'Cube', 'Cylinder', 'Cone', and 'Torus'.

task_completion.description: Verify that a large ground plane is present underneath the objects.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A large flat plane mesh is visible in the 3D viewport beneath the other five primitives, or a 'Plane' object is listed in the Outliner.

task_completion.description: Verify the five primitive objects are arranged in a line or grid and do not overlap.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 3D viewport, the objects are spaced out in a clear line or grid pattern with visible gaps between them.

task_completion.description: Verify that each of the five primitive objects has a distinct material with a unique color assigned.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 3D viewport (when in Material Preview or Rendered shading mode), the five objects display five clearly different colors. Alternatively, check the Material Properties tab for different material names/colors being assigned.

task_completion.description: Verify that there are at least two light sources in the scene.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for at least two light icons (Point, Sun, Spot, or Area) in the 3D viewport, or check the Outliner panel for at least two light objects.

task_completion.description: Verify the scene is saved to the correct file path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Blender window title bar shows 'showcase_scene.blend', or a file manager/save dialog shows the file being saved in the '/home/ga/BlenderProjects/' directory.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Blender GUI to build the scene.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Blender interface actively being used (menus open, objects selected, properties being adjusted in the panels) rather than just a terminal running a Python script.

integrity.description: The scene is genuinely built in Blender, not mocked up.
integrity.visual_evidence: Standard Blender UI elements (Outliner, Properties panel, Toolbar, 3D Viewport grid/axes) are visible and their contents match the scene being built.

integrity.description: The agent built the scene step-by-step rather than loading a pre-made file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Progressive screenshots show the scene being constructed over time (adding objects, moving them, coloring them) rather than appearing fully formed instantly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Required objects: UV Sphere, Cube, Cylinder, Cone, Torus. Minimum materials: 5 distinct colors. Minimum lights: 2. Minimum spacing between objects: 1.5 units (no overlap). Required output path: /home/ga/BlenderProjects/showcase_scene.blend.
